since_last: 80% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.40%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 80% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.00% · BTC -1.19% · Gold +1.19% · Nasdaq100 -1.61%. 80% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.40%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.40%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.21%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: INOD is the standout at +4.33%
cards.body: Leaders: INOD +4.33%, CEVA +3.91%, TER +3.88%, ORCL +3.87%, KLAC +3.64%. Laggards: DDOG -2.83%, TLN -2.27%, HON -1.90%, AAPL -0.96%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.80% at $163.29
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.80% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
